name: AscoBreastCancerGuidelineProtocolMonitoringPhase
title: Monitoring and response assessment
description: Monitor the patient during therapy and use response findings to guide ongoing decisions.

action.description: Use regular clinical examination, selective imaging, and pathologic complete response rather than blood or tissue biomarkers.
